# Apple | Sentry for Apple

Sentry supports Apple platforms via the [`sentry-cocoa`](https://github.com/getsentry/sentry-cocoa) SDK. Select your platform to get started:

* [![apple.ios icon](https://docs.sentry.io/_next/static/media/apple.007b3938.svg)](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/apple/guides/ios.md)

* [![apple.visionos icon](https://docs.sentry.io/_next/static/media/apple.007b3938.svg)](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/apple/guides/visionos.md)
